query: Eurosystem Collateral Management System ECMS launch date status 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"Eurosystem Collateral Management System ECMS launch date status 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1654,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"ECMS: launch of new Eurosystem Collateral Management System on June 16, 2025. On 24 October 2024, the European Central Bank (ECB) published a press release on the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) launch on 16 June 2025.Jan 10, 2025"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.securities-services.societegenerale.com/en/insights/views/news/ecms-launch-of-new-eurosystem-collateral-management-system-on-june-16-2025/#:~:text=June%2016%2C%202025-,ECMS%3A%20launch%20of%20new%20Eurosystem%20Collateral,System%20on%20June%2016%2C%202025&text=On%2024%20October%202024%2C%20the,launch%20on%2016%20June%202025.","title":"ECMS: launch of new Eurosystem Collateral Management System on June 16, 2025  - Societe Generale Securities Services","content":"On 24 October 2024, the European Central Bank (ECB) published a press release on the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) launch on 16 June 2025.
Towards a SFDR Revolution On November 20, 2025, the European Commission published its long-awaited final legislative proposal to amend the 2019...
The transposition process of the Directive on alternative investment funds managers EU 2024/927 (AIFMD 2) into Luxembourg law started on 3rd October 2025 with the bill of law 8628 provided to the Luxembourg Parliament.
At European level AIFMD 2 must be transposed by each Member State before April 2026 at the latest."},{"url":"https://www.ecb.europa.eu/press/intro/news/html/ecb.mipnews241024.en.html","title":"Eurosystem collateral management system to launch on 16 June 2025","content":"This date has been set by the ECB’s Governing Council in order to provide sufficient time for national central banks of the euro area and their counterparties to thoroughly test the system in a stable environment to ensure user readiness.
The decision to reschedule the launch of the ECMS from November 2024 was due to the need for additional preparation time identified by the Market Infrastructure Board to achieve a seamless launch.
The ECMS is a unified system that will harmonise the management of collateral for Eurosystem credit operations, replacing the systems currently operated by the 20 euro area national central banks."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/ecms-new-launch-date-future-collateral-management-europe-paymerix-juf7e","title":"ECMS: A New Launch Date for the Future of Collateral Management in Europe","content":"Originally planned for November 2024, this change reflects the complexity of establishing a unified collateral management system that harmonizes processes across the euro area.
Today, each national central bank (NCB) operates its own unique collateral management processes.
For institutions looking to understand the implications of ECMS and prepare for its launch, the ECB offers a comprehensive set of resources.
The June 2025 launch of ECMS marks a transformational shift in Europe’s financial landscape."},{"url":"https://www.ecb.europa.eu/press/intro/news/html/ecb.mipnews240925.en.html","title":"Launch of Eurosystem collateral management system rescheduled","content":"The ECB’s Governing Council has decided to reschedule the launch of its new Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) to the first half of 2025.
The exact launch date will be communicated in October 2024.
It is closely linked to the TARGET2-Securities (T2S) platform for the settlement of securities and to the T2 system for the transfer of central bank liquidity."},{"url":"https://www.clearstream.com/clearstream-en/res-library/releases-and-initiatives/act-now-to-leverage-the-future-potential-of-the-eurosystem-collateral-management-system-ecms--3404568","title":"Act now to leverage the future potential of the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS)","content":"For the planned launch of ECMS in the first half of 2025, Clearstream will be the only Eurozone CSD providing comprehensive triparty collateral management services fully integrated into the ECMS environment and for all Eurozone National Central Banks.
The ECMS is a new platform that will replace the existing collateral management systems of the 19 Eurosystem central banks.
By the first half of 2025, ECMS will become the sole system used to manage both collateral and credit in the Eurosystem.
Crucially, users of the ECMS will need to implement and master the workflows required to deliver collateral and request a credit line before launch."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Eurosystem Collateral Management System ECMS launch date status 2025","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://publikationen.bundesbank.de/content/960444","title":"Collateral management in the euro area since the introduction of the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS)undefined","content":"# Collateral management in the euro area since the introduction of the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) Monthly Report – July 2025. *The Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) was launched successfully on 16 June 2025. The ECMS will provide monetary policy counterparties with a single gateway for managing eligible assets across all central banks. The ECMS is the final project to be completed as part of the Eurosystem’s Vision 2020, which aims to upgrade and decisively enhance the Eurosystem’s market infrastructure in the fields of payments and securities settlement. **The** **ECMS** **was launched successfully in June 2025.** This new system provides monetary policy counterparties with a single gateway for managing eligible assets across all central banks and constitutes an integral part of TARGET Services. **The aim of the** **ECMS** **project was to create a unified collateral management system with fully harmonised functionalities.** The ECMS thus ensures that the assets used as collateral in Eurosystem credit operations are managed based on standardised processes across all of the countries in the euro area.","score":0.949786,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/ecms-new-launch-date-future-collateral-management-europe-paymerix-juf7e","title":"A New Launch Date for the Future of Collateral Management in Europe","content":"The European Central Bank (ECB) recently set a new launch date for the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS): June 16, 2025.","score":0.94584644,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ecb.europa.eu/press/intro/news/html/ecb.mipnews241024.en.html","title":"Eurosystem collateral management system to launch on 16 June 2025","content":"The new Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) will go live on 16 June 2025. This date has been set by the ECB's Governing Council.","score":0.93885136,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.ecb.europa.eu/press/pr/date/2025/html/ecb.pr250617~57930cda2f.en.html","title":"Eurosystem launches single collateral management system","content":"The Eurosystem successfully launched its new, unified Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) on 16 June 2025 after the migration to","score":0.93265617,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.securities-services.societegenerale.com/en/insights/views/news/ecms-launch-of-new-eurosystem-collateral-management-system-on-june-16-2025","title":"ECMS: launch of new Eurosystem Collateral Management System on ...","content":"The European Central Bank (ECB) published a press release on the Eurosystem Collateral Management System (ECMS) launch on 16 June 2025.","score":0.9203972,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.9,"request_id":"9a4f35d5-0957-425d-90e6-5c8974bf8670"}
